trans-unit.source: A focused research workspace for Bitcoin valuation models, cycle signals, and long-term market context. Create an account to open the live charts.
Professional Bitcoin market tools after login
Long-term logarithmic valuation bands for market-cycle context.
Moving-average crossover signals designed for cycle-top awareness.
Scarcity model tracking with halving context and divergence views.
Charts, annotations, exports, and admin tools require an account.
No charts viewed yet. Explore the chart library to get started!
Automatically backfills all Bitcoin price history from 2013 (earliest exchange data) to today, one year at a time.
Initialized days of price data + all metrics
Onboarding dismissed. Account completion tracking will be enabled next.
Don't have an account? Create one
Login successful. Complete the quick orientation to continue.
Reset link is invalid or expired
Already have an account? Sign in
The request could not be completed. Please try again.
Combine Bitcoin metrics with arithmetic operators to create your own KPI widget.
The widget could not be added. Please try again.
The widget could not be saved. Please try again.
Cumulative Value Coin Days Destroyed — a historically accurate bottom indicator
No CVDD chart data is available yet.
Long-term price model based on power law regression since Bitcoin genesis
Logarithmic growth curve with color-coded valuation bands
Chart data could not be loaded. Please try again.
Interactive chart rendering starts in the next chart visualization story.
Market value vs realized value to identify statistically extreme cycle positions
Chart data could not be loaded. Please try again.
Professional Bitcoin analysis tools, free forever
Follow cycle signals, valuation models, and on-chain context from a focused workspace built for long-term market decisions.
Keep the indicators you care about closest
Start with curated KPI widgets, then shape your workspace around valuation, momentum, alerts, and research workflows.
Turn Bitcoin models into daily operating signals
Open historical charts, compare timeframes, and prepare alerts so important threshold changes do not slip past you.
Moving-average crossover signal for potential Bitcoin cycle tops
Chart data could not be loaded. Please try again.
Daily miner revenue relative to its 365-day average to identify miner stress and euphoria
Chart data could not be loaded. Please try again.
Scarcity-driven model price compared with Bitcoin market price
Chart data could not be loaded. Please try again.
trans-unit.note: Stock to Flow chart load failure
